title: Choose storage for inspectable local decision runs
decisionStatement: Which storage architecture should a local-first decision tool use as its canonical run record while supporting replay, queries, and future team adapters?
context: Each run contains append-only events, a derived graph, call artifacts, a human-readable dossier, and usage metadata. Runs must remain inspectable on disk and replay deterministically. Large installations may eventually need cross-run queries and optional shared storage.

inScope: JSONL and file-directory storage, embedded databases, and hybrid projections
Crash recovery, schema evolution, replay, indexing, and export
A clean adapter boundary for future remote storage
outOfScope: A hosted multi-tenant service in the current release
Storing provider credentials inside run records
constraints: The canonical history must be append-only and replayable
A user must be able to inspect or export a run without proprietary tooling
Derived indexes may be rebuilt and must never silently replace source history

criteria.label: Replay integrity
criteria.description: How strongly the design preserves ordered source history and deterministic replay.
criteria.zeroAnchor: Source history can be silently overwritten or reordered
criteria.oneAnchor: History is append-only, validated, and exactly replayable

criteria.label: Inspectability
criteria.description: How easily users and tools can understand, copy, diff, and export run data.
criteria.zeroAnchor: Run data requires opaque or proprietary tooling
criteria.oneAnchor: Canonical records and documented projections are directly inspectable

criteria.label: Query and retrieval
criteria.description: How effectively the design supports navigation within a run and comparison across runs.
criteria.zeroAnchor: Useful queries require full manual scans
criteria.oneAnchor: Common and advanced queries are indexed without compromising history

criteria.label: Evolution cost
criteria.description: How safely schemas, projections, and future storage adapters can evolve.
criteria.zeroAnchor: Schema change requires unsafe bulk rewrites
criteria.oneAnchor: Migrations and adapters evolve through explicit versioned contracts
